compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Route the existing criterion->authoring mapping to plan authors, and fix the gate doc's stale threshold numbers. Docs-only change (no runtime behavior).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md's "Ticket template the gates enforce" section gains a paragraph directing authors, BEFORE writing a plan, to docs/plan-review-criteria-guide.md and `rebar explain <criterion-id>`, and names the current blocking-tier criterion ids (F1, E2, G5, T5e, COH, G6, T1, T4, T8, G1G2, E4) so authors know which sections to read first. Oracle: `grep -n "plan-review-criteria-guide" CLAUDE.md` and `grep -n "rebar explain" CLAUDE.md` each return at least one hit inside that section.
- [ ] docs/plan-review-gate.md no longer states 0.70 as the block threshold for the calibration-2 criteria; its threshold statements match src/rebar/llm/plan_review/criteria_routing.json. Oracle (negative): `grep -n "0\.70" docs/plan-review-gate.md` shows no line describing F1/E2/G5/T5e/COH/G6 at 0.70. Oracle (positive): `grep -n "0\.60" docs/plan-review-gate.md` returns at least one hit attributing the 0.60 threshold to F1/E2/G5/T5e/COH/G6, and the doc states the 0.70 tier (T1/T4/T8/G1G2) and 0.75 tier (E4).
- [ ] docs/plan-review-gate.md documents (one short paragraph) that remediation-mode eligibility currently requires a prior certified PASS signature, so the rising floor does not engage during BLOCK loops - the honest current behavior, cross-referencing story a850-1392-55b0-4514 in this epic. Oracle: `grep -n "certified PASS" docs/plan-review-gate.md` returns at least one hit inside the new paragraph.
- [ ] The commit gate accepts the change: `git commit` succeeds with the pre-commit hook active. Note `make lint` runs ruff over src/tests only - Markdown files are not covered by it; this AC verifies the commit gate does not reject the touched .md files, not that ruff lints them.

Files: CLAUDE.md, docs/plan-review-gate.md.

file_impact.reason: stale threshold numbers + eligibility limitation note

compiled_state.title: Route plan-authoring guidance to authors + fix stale gate-doc thresholds
